feedback.text: I've always been for freedom, but I rarely see jt nowadays except from ordinary everyday people who are in need of it, not people benefiting from the lack of freedom for the ordinary people, everyone should own what they buy with their cold, hard cash. Everyone. And it's no ones right to take that away from them by killing their favorite games just because it's inconvenient for them to maintain it anymore, give people what they want, giver people their right, stop killing games.
